title: Basic JavaScript Weather App
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Weather App. Focus on implementing Weather API integration (OpenWeatherMap) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Weather App
description: Create a function that uses Weather API integration (OpenWeatherMap) and Geolocation API together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Weather App Project
description: Build a small application that applies Weather API integration (OpenWeatherMap), Geolocation API, Async data fetching in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Weather App
description: The following code has bugs related to Weather API integration (OpenWeatherMap). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Weather App
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Weather API integration (OpenWeatherMap) and Geolocation API.
